decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'corridor_webster-ave-bronx' matches an existing registry record with identical corridor name ('Webster Avenue Corridor'), street ('Webster Avenue'), borough ('Bronx'), source ('2012_02_06_brt_webster_cac1'), and description referencing the Bx41 route. The observation already resolves to this record; no link to a different record is warranted.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the proposed Webster Avenue SBS Corridor (Bx 41 route) in New York City.
■ Based on the existing Bx41 route ■ 5.3 miles long
